name: Potatoes and Onions in Sweet and Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 small New potatoes, cut into quarters
12 Black or green olives, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over high heat, heat the olive oil.
2. Saute the onion for 2 minutes until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the potatoes, water, capers (if using), and olives to the skillet.
4. Cover and lower the heat to medium. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are just beginning to soften, about 7 minutes.
5. Remove the cover and continue cooking until all the liquid has evaporated.
6. Dissolve the sugar in the vinegar by stirring.
7. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
8. Serve warm or chilled. The flavor improves if the dish is refrigerated for a couple of days.
223 calories, 11g fat, 0 cholesterol per serving
